name: Alan S. McKim
title: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
description: Founder of Clean Harbors who serves as the top executive responsible for overall company strategy and operations.

name: Michael L. Battles
title: Executive Vice President and Co-Chief Financial Officer
description: Co-leads the company's financial strategy, reporting, and capital allocation alongside the other Co-CFO.

name: Eric W. Gerstenberg
title: President and Chief Operating Officer
description: Oversees day-to-day operations of Clean Harbors' environmental and industrial services businesses.

name: Brian P. Weber
title: Executive Vice President and Co-Chief Financial Officer
description: Co-leads financial planning, treasury, and investor relations functions alongside the other Co-CFO.

name: Robert Speights
title: Executive Vice President, Sales and Marketing
description: Responsible for driving revenue growth through the company's sales organization and marketing initiatives.

name: James M. Rutledge
title: Executive Vice President, Corporate Development
description: Leads mergers, acquisitions, and corporate development strategy to expand Clean Harbors' business.

name: Kurt Kelsey
title: Executive Vice President, Government Affairs and General Counsel
description: Oversees legal affairs, regulatory compliance, and government relations for the company.

name: Michael Egan
title: Senior Vice President, Finance and Corporate Controller
description: Manages financial reporting, accounting operations, and internal controls across the organization.

name: Todd Duchene
title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary
description: Provides legal counsel and manages corporate governance and board-related matters.

name: Rick Ravesteijn
title: Senior Vice President, Health, Safety, Environment and Quality
description: Leads the company's health, safety, environmental compliance, and quality assurance programs.
